title: Section 17
content: 1 [17. Additional capital and grants to the Authority by the Central Government.--The Central Government may, after due appropriation made by Parliament, by law in this behalf,-- (a) provide any capital that may be required by the Authority for the discharge of its functions under this Act or for any purpose connected therewith on such terms and conditions as that Government may determine; (b) pay to the Authority, on such terms and conditions as the Central Government may determine, by way of loans or grants such sums of money as that Government may consider necessary for the efficient discharge by the Authority of its functions under this Act.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 8, ibid., for section 17 (w.e.f. 24-1-1997).
